title: Clan Alya
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:ClanAlyaBothan.jpg|thumb|Sigil of Clan Alya.]]
'''Clan Alya''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[clan]]. After the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]] was purchased by the [[Combined Bothan Clans|Bothan Council]], Clan Alya was one of three clans allowed to settle it. The clan was influential in both Bothan politics and the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]].<ref name="SOESB">''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

By far the most famous member of Clan Alya was [[Borsk Fey'lya]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]] and [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Another notable member was [[Koth Melan]], the leader of the Bothan Spynet during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SOESB" />

Members of the clan who completed their goals in life acquired the "y'lya" honorific.<ref name="Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire novel">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref>
